name_en: Top-tier Original M25072 Elephant Grey. This elegant Side Trunk medium handbag pays homage to the brand's traditional trunks by Creative Director Nicolas Ghesquulere. The body is grained calfskin with smooth calfskin trim, S-ock lock, and metal-effect rounded corners. Handles and adjustable shoulder strap are detachable, allowing for hand, shoulder, or crossbody wear. Dimensions: 21 × 14 × 6 cm
